headline.main: What will you do when the miracle drugs fail?
headline.sub_headline: Drugs are becoming less and less effective, more and more expensive, and increasingly dangerous. The big drug companies want you to believe you've no choice. But now you do...

lead_analysis.opening_lines: If you take drugs but aren't getting any better... there's a good reason. Drugs only mask your health problems by suppressing symptoms. They do nothing to truly heal you.

key_points: Drugs only mask symptoms, don't heal
Some drugs don't work at all for many patients
proof_elements: University research on drug effectiveness decline
Statistics on drug benefits vs placebo
Examples of superbugs resistant to antibiotics

key_points: Herb combo beats 80% of hard-to-treat cancers
Patient leaves hospice after nurse's tea
Cardio cure-all conquers multiple heart conditions
Strengthens heart without drug side effects
Supports healthy blood pressure and cholesterol

big_idea.core_concept: The pharmaceutical system is failing you, but science-backed herbal medicine offers proven, safe alternatives for virtually every health condition
big_idea.unique_mechanism: Specific herbs in exact dosages and forms, backed by clinical research, that actually heal rather than mask symptoms
big_idea.proof_concept: 594-page comprehensive guide with 200+ conditions covered, hundreds of herbs detailed, all with scientific backing
big_idea.enemy: Big Pharma drug dependency and the failing pharmaceutical system
big_idea.transformation_promise: From drug-dependent and declining health to naturally healed and thriving
